title: rhus canadensis var. serotina
intro: Rhus canadensis var. serotina, also known as the serotinous sumac, is a variant of the poison sumac plant native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily its resinous sap, which contains compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Rhus canadensis var. serotina include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rhus canadensis var. serotina often include its sap, which can be used in salves, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
